location.campus_name: IIIT Sri City permanent residential campus
location.official_address: 630 Gnan Marg, Sri City, Tirupati District, Andhra Pradesh, India
location.nearest_bus_terminal: Tada bus stop; Madhavaram MMBT is a major Chennai origin point
location.technology_ecosystem: Sri City industrial ecosystem with 220+ manufacturing MNCs reported in the 2026 JoSAA profile; Chennai and Tirupati regional access
location.cost_of_living_band: Residential institutional fee model; off-campus cost not calculated
location.data_origin: Official address and travel data; approximate map-derived coordinates

senior_junior_culture.summary: Admissions megathreads show seniors and alumni answering practical questions, but public evidence is too limited to generalise about all batches, club hierarchies or mentoring. No campus-wide ragging claim is made.
positive_themes: peer guidance on admissions and placements
negative_themes: insufficient evidence on club hierarchy and fresher inclusion

academic_culture.summary: Official sources describe a fast, practice-theory-practice curriculum, early projects, research opportunities and industry-oriented CSE/ECE tracks. Student discussions broadly support an academically focused environment, while workload, grading strictness and faculty accessibility receive mixed or incomplete evidence.
negative_themes: public evidence on grading and attendance is incomplete

hostel_reality.summary: The official 2026 profile states IIIT Sri City is residential and on-campus stay is compulsory, with two boys hostels and one girls hostel functional and additional construction underway. Student reports generally recognise newer infrastructure but differ on room/building quality and earlier arrangements; current allocation and occupancy should be confirmed.
negative_themes: older hostel blocks receive mixed comments
mess and room quality evidence is inconsistent

club_and_campus_life.summary: The official profile lists fourteen technical, cultural and social clubs plus national outreach programmes, and current institute pages show active technical clubs and an entrepreneurship ecosystem. Student sources acknowledge activities but often describe limited outside-city life.
negative_themes: industrial-town setting limits spontaneous city life
activity levels vary and some clubs lack dated public updates

coding_and_placement_culture.summary: Official sources show programming from the first year, a full-stack track, competitive programming, internships and semester-long industry projects. Student discussions repeatedly regard coding and placements as strengths, while debating eligibility denominators and whether headline statistics represent the full batch. Official registered-cohort data is retained as the factual record.
negative_themes: placement denominator is registered students rather than total intake

locality_and_student_life.summary: The campus is inside the Sri City industrial ecosystem, close to Tada but roughly 60-80 km from major Chennai/Tirupati hubs. Official transport information is detailed, while student sources repeatedly describe limited outside life. The industrial ecosystem may support exposure, but daily city access requires planning.
negative_themes: limited city nightlife and local market variety

overall_satisfaction.summary: IIIT Sri City appears best suited to students prioritising CSE/AI/ECE curricula, coding, research, placements and a residential technical environment. Students seeking low fees, a broad branch portfolio, mature metropolitan college life or a guaranteed relaxed workload should evaluate the trade-offs carefully.
negative_themes: placement and hostel scopes require careful reading

parent_mode_summary.summary: IIIT Sri City is an Institute of National Importance with a focused three-branch technology portfolio, residential campus and strong college-reported registered-cohort placement figures. The main parent-side checks are total fee escalation, scholarship eligibility, branch lock-in, hostel construction/allocation and the exact placement denominator.
priority_points: Calculated four-year institutional estimate about ₹18.83 lakh before revisions and personal costs
2026 placement report is provisional as of 21 April 2026
Tada is the closest station; Chennai/Tirupati airports are around 77-82 km
Scholarships and loans require separate approval
parent_mode_summary.source_confidence: Core admission, seat, fee and cutoff data are authoritative; placements/facilities are institution-published; travel coordinates and qualitative summaries are calculated/student-reported.

student_mode_summary.summary: Best fit for students who want a technology-focused residential environment, early coding/projects, research and internships. CSE/AI&DS align most directly with software/data roles; ECE offers programming plus embedded, communication and VLSI-oriented pathways. Outside-city life is limited and branch change is not available.
priority_points: Choose the branch assuming no later branch change
Use technical clubs and semester-long projects
Verify company eligibility before assuming every software recruiter accepts ECE
Plan around a residential industrial-town location and high fees

decision_risks.analysis: Current fee schedule produces a calculated four-year institutional estimate of about ₹18.83 lakh if rates do not rise; official page explicitly permits fee revisions from second year.
Published percentages use registered cohorts. A student should not interpret them as percentage of total seat intake without verified graduation and eligibility counts.
Official 2026 profile states branch change is no longer allowed. Students should choose CSE, ECE or AI&DS assuming no later switch.
On-campus stay is compulsory, but additional hostels/dining facilities are under construction; current room assignment and occupancy should be confirmed.

decision_risks.risk: Industrial-town rather than metropolitan campus life
decision_risks.analysis: Sri City offers industry exposure but is far from central Chennai/Tirupati; students wanting frequent metropolitan access may find the location restrictive.
ECE includes programming, but official placement averages differ by branch and company eligibility is not published. Software-oriented ECE candidates need a parallel coding plan.
Most schemes are application-based and subject to live income, category, domicile and renewal rules; no award is guaranteed.

data_gaps: Current programme-wise NBA accreditation and validity periods were not verified.
Current NAAC grade/score and validity were not verified.
AICTE approval applicability/institute ID was not verified.
An exact published NIRF Engineering rank for 2025/2026 was not verified.
Official 2026 admission brochure, schedule and final DASA/Study in India seat details may change.
Branch-specific placement denominators, eligible-student counts, internship counts, PPO counts and stipend statistics are not published on the current placement page.
Company-specific roles, branches, CGPA requirements, packages and selection counts are generally unavailable.
Current hostel room occupancy, curfew, laundry charges, complaint-resolution times and final additional-hostel completion dates require confirmation.
Nearest major hospital and medical escalation route were not verified from a current official source.
Scholarship benefit amounts, deadlines and renewal criteria must be checked from live 2026-27 scheme notices.
